name: Chocolate Loaf with Mocha Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Butter; chilled (cut into small pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Spray a loaf pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Line the pan with two layers of waxed paper, extending it 3 inches over both long and short ends.
4. Spray the waxed paper with cooking spray and dust with flour, shaking off excess.
5. Melt butter and chocolate in a saucepan over low heat until smooth.
6. In a large bowl, beat egg yolks with an electric mixer until blended.
7. Slowly add sugar, beating until thick and pale (about 5 minutes).
8. Gradually beat in melted chocolate mixture.
9. Whisk flour and cinnamon together in a bowl; stir into the chocolate mixture.
10. Beat egg whites in a medium bowl until stiff but not dry.
11. Fold egg whites into the chocolate mixture.
12. Pour batter into the prepared loaf pan and bake for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
13. Let the cake cool on a wire rack for 30 minutes.
14. Loosen the edges with a knife, lift the cake using the waxed paper, and set it on the rack.
15. Sauce: In a saucepan, mix chocolate, butter, and water-coffee mixture. Whisk over medium heat until smooth (about 5 minutes).
16. Serve slices of the chocolate loaf drizzled with mocha sauce.
